game_name: Mickey Mania: The Timeless Adventures of Mickey Mouse

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for SNES version

special_mechanics.name: Marble throwing
special_mechanics.description: Mickey can attack enemies by using a limited supply of marbles collected throughout levels

special_mechanics.name: Jump attack
special_mechanics.description: Mickey can attack enemies by jumping on them

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/Qualitative data only. Available sources (TCRF wiki and Wikipedia) document game structure, level design, and features but contain no numerical physics parameters. Reviews mention 'responsive controls' and difficulty variations across platforms but no specific movement mechanics are quantified.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Mickey Mania SNES article
